titleStmt.title: SII 37.128: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 128. (A.R. No. E 76 of 1938-39.) Kūḍēru, Anantapur Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Śrāvaṇa śu. 15, corresponding to 1524 A.D., July 15, Friday.

It states that in accordance with the order (Nirūpa) of Prince Tirumalarāya his servant to Heggajiyya, Mārapa Nāyaningāru, son of Mālapa Nāyaningāru granted the right of the use of a channel for conducting worship and offering to the god Saṅgamēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaika śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1446 Agunēṭi
tāraṇa saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa su 15
puṇyakālamaṁdu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mū
rurāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīrapratāpa
Arirāya vibhāṭa Aṣṭadigrāja
manōbhayaṁkara pūrava dakṣi
ṇa pascima samudrādhīśarā ya
vvana dēśādhirāyastāpanācā
ryyalaina kruṣṇarāyamahārā
yala komāruḍu tirumalarā
ya mahārāyala nirūpa
llanūvāri hitabhrityulaina mala
panāyini kumāruḍu mārapa
nāyinigāru kūḍali saṁgamēsva
ra kṣētra samārādhakulayina tō
ka heggajiyyalaku yicina
dharmmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnanū
māku rāyalavāru pāliṁci
na simalōni kūḍali grāmamaṁdu sa
ṁgamēśvaradēvara dhūpadīpanayivēdhya
laku pūrvamaṁdu celle saṁgamē
svaradēvarakāluva tirumalarā
ya mahārāyalaku puṇya
ṁgānu tadhātithi puṇyakāla
maṁdu saṁgamēsvaradēvuni kā
luva Āsaṁgamēsvaradēvuniki sama
rpiṁstimi . yi dharmānaku yavaru ta
ppinā tama mātāpiturla vā
raṇāsilōpalā vadhiṁcina pāpānaṁ bō
yinivāru gōbrāṁhaṇa vadha
sēsinavāru śunakamāṁsa
surāpānaṁ sēviṁcina
vāru Ani yiccina dhaṁ
rmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 37.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
